phdScholars.name: Mr. A. Rajesh Kumar
phdScholars.topic: AI-Based Adaptive Intrusion Detection Systems for IoT Networks
phdScholars.description: Researching novel deep learning architectures for real-time intrusion detection in heterogeneous IoT environments with focus on adversarial robustness.

phdScholars.name: Ms. S. Priya Dharshini
phdScholars.topic: Blockchain-Enabled Security Framework for Decentralized Systems
phdScholars.description: Developing a blockchain-based security framework that ensures data integrity and privacy in decentralized computing systems.

phdScholars.name: Mr. D. Karthik Singh
phdScholars.topic: Quantum Cryptographic Protocols for Secure Communication
phdScholars.description: Investigating quantum key distribution protocols and post-quantum cryptographic methods for securing next-generation communication networks.

phdScholars.name: Ms. N. Meera Gupta
phdScholars.description: Exploring federated learning and differential privacy techniques to enable secure AI model training on sensitive healthcare data.
